name: VIVO Cannabis Inc.
summary: VIVO Cannabis Inc. cultivates, produces, and sells cannabis products for the medical and adult-use markets in Canada, Germany, and Australia. The company offers dried cannabis flower products, pre-rolls and cannabis oils, and other cannabis-derived products; and cannabis-infused chocolates, vapes, kief, live rosin, bubble hash, brick hash, and shatter and wax solvent extracts under the Canna Farms, Beacon Medical, Fireside, Fireside-X, Lumina, and Canadian Bud Collection brands. The company also operates a network of medical cannabis clinics under the Harvest Medicine name. It serves customers through direct and retail sale; and HMED Connect telemedicine platform, an online medical cannabis platform. The company is headquartered in Napanee, Canada.
